---
name: New module proposal
about: Propose a new module to fill a curriculum gap
title: "[MODULE] Track N — Module title"
labels: new-module, needs-review
assignees: ''
---

## What gap does this fill?

<!-- Which track does this belong to? What's missing from the current curriculum? -->

**Track:** <!-- e.g. Track 2 — RAG -->
**Proposed module ID:** <!-- e.g. 2.5 -->
**Proposed title:** <!-- e.g. "Chunking Strategies for RAG" -->

## Who is this for?

<!-- Which personas benefit most? curious / leader / junior / senior / sre -->

## Why it matters

<!-- What goes wrong if a learner doesn't understand this? What becomes possible if they do? -->

## Proposed Production Gotcha

<!-- The one thing that bites real teams. Must be specific and actionable, not theoretical.
     See CONTRIBUTING.md for examples of good vs. bad gotchas. -->

## Draft outline (optional)

<!-- Layer 1 key points, Layer 2 code idea, Layer 3 primary sources you'd cite -->

## Primary sources

<!-- At least one: paper, RFC, official docs, or post-mortem with date -->
- [ ]

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked that this module doesn't duplicate an existing one in `curriculum/registry.md`
- [ ] I'm willing to write a draft (or part of one)
- [ ] The Production Gotcha is something that has actually happened to a team
